_comment: Species: Spirit Bear (灵熊) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Spirit Bear

canonical.appearance: Massive bear 3 m tall, fur spirit-brown, fists shatter stone
canonical.size: 3 m adult, 2000 jin; ancient 6 m, 30000 jin
canonical.behavior: Territorial body-tempering beast; cultivates by absorbing earth-essence
canonical.habitat: Mountain forests, earth-aspected caves, spirit-herb hills
canonical.relationships: Rival of mountain lions; preyed upon by giant savage apes
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: spirit_bear — common beast, no condensed inner core

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
